g.text: Native PDF (Forthcoming / «planned») — a BrowserView positioned over the active tab
state in app-db; the BrowserView is
a separate native surface owned by MAIN, kept aligned to the placeholder by IPC
same chokidar watcher per open path
as Markdown — only the action (reload the BrowserView) differs.
IPC seam (contextBridge) — all IPC arrows amber
